---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for AlgoViz
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement, needs-triage
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 What's the Idea?

<!-- A clear, concise description of the feature you'd like to see. -->

---

## 🧩 Problem It Solves

<!-- What pain point or limitation does this address?
     E.g. "I always struggle to understand recursion visually because..." -->

---

## 🛠️ Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe how you imagine this working inside AlgoViz.
     Be as specific or as high-level as you like. -->

---

## 🎬 Example / Mockup

<!-- Optional: Add a sketch, wireframe, pseudocode, or GIF showing roughly what you mean. -->

```
# Example: what the user would write
import viz
...
```

---

## 🔍 Alternatives Considered

<!-- Have you thought of other ways to solve this? Why do you prefer your proposed approach? -->

---

## 📌 Where Does This Fit?

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] 🎬 Algorithm visualization (new animation type)
- [ ] 📊 Performance benchmarking / graph
- [ ] 📈 Complexity detection
- [ ] 🤖 AI explanations / suggestions
- [ ] 🧩 New algorithm support
- [ ] 🌍 Multi-language support
- [ ] 🎨 UI / UX improvement
- [ ] 📖 Documentation
- [ ] 🔧 Developer tooling / extension internals
- [ ] 🌐 Other

---

## 🗺️ Roadmap Alignment

<!-- Does this align with an existing roadmap item? If so, which one? -->

See [ROADMAP.md](../../ROADMAP.md) for what's currently planned.

---

<!-- Anything else — links, research, related issues, etc. -->
